category_sources: source_facts.description says Yet Another Z80 Emulator; official YAZE-AG page describes exact Z80 microprocessor simulation and CP/M support.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading uses 'YAZE-AG - Yet Another Z80 Emulator by AG'; source_facts.name is yaze-ag.
docs_sources: Official YAZE-AG project page has a Documentation section linking install docs, yaze(1), cdm(1), README files, and yaze-ag.doc.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official project page publishes source tarballs and development directory but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official project page identify YAZE-AG as a Z80 CPU emulator with CP/M-related disk and BIOS support.
